meta.title: PitchSongs - Professional Audio Manipulation Tool
meta.description: Transform your music with professional audio effects. Create sped up versions, slow + reverb remixes, or retro 8-bit sounds. 100% free, client-side processing for complete privacy.
meta.keywords: audio manipulation, speed up audio, slow reverb, 8-bit audio, audio effects, music editor, audio processor, web audio, free audio tool
